Shopping Time

Triggers: Once in a while

A festive cart breaks through the enemy lines. 3 enemies with the least health take 20000 damage, while 3 random enemies are disarmed for 2 sec. All enemies that have taken damage or have been disarmed get stunned for a short time.

Requirements: 90-100
